name: Toptracer Range at Arkansas Golf Center
address: 5150 John W Allison Rd, Conway, AR 72034
about: Arkansas Golf Center is a comprehensive golf destination featuring an award-winning retail store, club fitting center, instruction academy, and a driving range. The centerpiece is the Toptracer Range, offering a high-tech entertainment venue with bays for practice, lessons, and simulator play. Fittings and lessons utilize premium launch monitor technology such as Trackman 4, Flightscope X3, and Foresight GC Quad, ensuring a scientifically-based approach to club optimization and skill improvement. The facility also houses a 7,000 sq ft pro shop, a driving range, and options for custom club building and repair, all available for booking and walk-in service.
why_golfers_like_it: Access to the latest premium launch monitor technology (Trackman, Flightscope, GC Quad) for precise club fittings and swing analysis
Combination of a real grass driving range and climate-controlled indoor bays for year-round practice and fitting
Comprehensive all-in-one services from retail and repairs to lessons and simulator sessions in one location

food_and_drink.notes: No on-site food options are mentioned.

simulator_hardware.notes: Used for lessons and fittings for precise ball and club data
Used for club fitting in tandem with other monitors
Photometric camera launch monitor used for fittings
Indoor virtual golf simulator bay available

faq.question: Do I need to bring my own clubs?
faq.answer: Yes, you are expected to bring your own clubs for simulator and Toptracer bay sessions. However, the venue has thousands of demo clubs available for use during fittings.

faq.question: Can I bring my own food and drinks?
faq.answer: No, there is no mention of outside food or drink being permitted. No on-site bar or kitchen is mentioned.

faq.question: How long does it take to play 18 holes on the simulator?
faq.answer: The website does not specify the time required for a full 18 holes. It does mention that a Toptracer Bay can be booked for one hour.

faq.question: Is the venue kid-friendly?
faq.answer: Yes, Arkansas Golf Center offers junior golf programs and is a family-oriented facility. The Toptracer Range is described as a golf entertainment venue that would appeal to various ages.
